objectives.title: Finish The Intro And Leave Pallet
objectives.summary: Clear the opening sequence, get a starter from Oak, and be ready to head north from Pallet Town.
objectives.completion_predicate: The player can move freely in Pallet Town and start the Route 1 trip.
failure_hints: If dialog is active, keep the batch tiny and clear text before moving.
Use the annotated frame to confirm whether Oak, the lab, or a doorway is in view.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save after the intro is complete and the player can freely move in Pallet Town.
objectives.route_hint: Use raw actions for the intro, then move north out of Pallet Town toward Route 1.

objectives.title: Reach Viridian Mart And Get Oak's Parcel
objectives.summary: Travel from Pallet Town to Viridian City and trigger the mart sequence that gives Oak's Parcel.
objectives.completion_predicate: The bag or flags show Oak's Parcel.
failure_hints: Probe unexplored route segments with short movement batches and re-observe after each one.
Use navigation once explored tiles make a clean Route 1 path obvious.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save once Oak's Parcel has been obtained in Viridian City.
objectives.route_hint: Head north through Route 1 into Viridian City, then enter the mart.

objectives.title: Return Oak's Parcel
objectives.summary: Bring the parcel back to Oak's Lab and clear the follow-up dialog until the Pokedex is received.
objectives.completion_predicate: The flags report that the player has the Pokedex.
failure_hints: When back in Oak's Lab, prefer short dialog-clearing action batches instead of long movement chains.
If unsure which NPC is targeted, use the interaction probe and raw frame together.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save after the Pokedex is awarded and the lab dialog is fully cleared.
objectives.route_hint: Go south to Pallet Town, enter Oak's Lab, and finish the dialog chain.

objectives.title: Reach Viridian Forest
objectives.summary: Travel north from Viridian City toward Route 2 and the south forest gate.
objectives.completion_predicate: The current map is Route 2, Viridian Forest Gate (S), Viridian Forest, or the north gate while the player already has the Pokedex.
failure_hints: If the route is unclear, trust explored tiles and route cards before freehand wandering.
Heal if needed, but keep the route anchored on the forest path.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save at the south forest gate before crossing the forest.
objectives.route_hint: Head north in Viridian City to Route 2 and enter Viridian Forest.

objectives.title: Cross Viridian Forest
objectives.summary: Navigate through Viridian Forest and exit into Pewter City.
objectives.completion_predicate: The current map becomes Pewter City or the north gate after the forest.
failure_hints: Use navigation for explored corridors and only probe unknown branches one short batch at a time.
If the harness raises a stuck warning, recover before burning more turns.
objectives.save_recommendation: Save after arriving in Pewter City and before entering the gym.
objectives.route_hint: Keep moving northward through explored forest routes until the north gate and Pewter exit are reached.

objectives.title: Prepare In Pewter And Enter The Gym
objectives.summary: Arrive in Pewter City, restore the team if needed, and move into Pewter Gym.
objectives.completion_predicate: The current map is Pewter Gym.
failure_hints: If the team is weak, use the Pokecenter before the gym.
Treat local building entrances as preferred landmarks instead of open-world probing.
objectives.save_recommendation: Create a fresh save before stepping into the Brock fight sequence.
objectives.route_hint: Use local navigation inside Pewter City to reach the Pokecenter if needed, then the gym entrance.

objectives.title: Defeat Brock
objectives.summary: Clear the Pewter Gym challenge and defeat Brock to earn the Boulder Badge.
objectives.completion_predicate: The badge count increases to at least 1.
failure_hints: Keep battle action batches extremely short and re-observe after each menu advance.
If the fight goes badly, prefer the top recovery save over improvising from a weak state.
objectives.save_recommendation: Auto-save on battle entry and again after the badge is earned.
objectives.route_hint: Finish the gym challenge, then clear the post-battle badge dialog fully.

objectives.title: Pack Complete: Brock
objectives.summary: The Boulder Badge is earned. Stabilize the run and hand off to the next route pack.
objectives.completion_predicate: The player has at least one badge.
failure_hints: Do not idle in Pewter once the badge is secured; hand off to the next route immediately.
objectives.save_recommendation: Keep a clean post-Brock save as a durable checkpoint.
objectives.route_hint: Leave Pewter and start the Cerulean route.
